overall.description: Game engine footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire first sitting on a Victorian mansion porch overlooking a lush garden courtyard, then transitioning via fade-to-black to walking through expansive golden grassland prairies with snow-capped mountains and a distant lake under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian mansion porch with ornate balustrade overlooking lush garden courtyard

events.description: character raises hand to touch neck and face while seated on the bench
character stands up from the bench and turns toward the right
character walks off-screen to the right, exiting the porch area

agents.ego_description: sitting on a porch bench observing the garden courtyard, briefly touching face, then standing and walking away

entered.detail: large multi-story Victorian house with pointed roof and wraparound porch
decorative carved stone balustrade with urn-shaped posts along the porch edge
tall palm trees visible in the garden beyond the railing
thick stone support column for the porch roof
tree with pink blossoms visible behind the mansion
lush landscaped garden with various tropical plants and pathways

segments.scene_description: The character sits on a covered porch of a Victorian mansion, surrounded by ornate stone railings and columns, overlooking a dense garden with palm trees and flowering plants. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting as the character observes the surroundings, touches his face, stands up, and walks away.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with distant snow-capped mountains and lake

events.description: fade from black reveals open grassland landscape with mountains, character begins walking forward
character briefly raises hand to adjust hat while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall golden grass toward the distant snow-capped mountains and lake

entered.detail: majestic mountain range with snow-covered peaks under a partly cloudy blue sky
rolling hills covered in tall golden grass swaying in the wind
large body of water visible in the distance to the right
small pine trees and bushes dotting the landscape
small rustic wooden structure visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the scene opens into a vast sunlit prairie with snow-capped mountains dominating the left horizon and a lake visible to the right. The character walks steadily through the tall golden grass toward the distant landscape, briefly adjusting his hat as he moves through the open terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from the secluded elegance of a Victorian estate to the raw expanse of a sunlit wilderness. It begins on a covered porch surrounded by ornate stone railings and columns, where a character sits under an overcast sky overlooking a dense garden of palm trees and flowering plants. After the character stands and walks away, the scene shifts through a fade into a vast, open prairie bathed in bright sunlight. The camera then follows the character as he walks steadily through tall golden grass, adjusting his hat while moving toward a distant lake and towering snow-capped mountains.
